title: ScaffoldOutputSchema
description: Output of /project-scaffold; consumed by /project-orchestrate Step 1 to scope the run.

scope.description: Whether the run is PRD-scoped or covers all open epics.

scopedEpics.description: Epic slugs (local mode) or milestone numbers (remote mode) created/touched by this scaffold.

scopedStories.description: Story slugs or issue numbers created/touched by this scaffold.

designSpikeEpic.description: Slug of the auto-injected design-spike epic, if any.

queueStateFilePath.description: Path to orchestration-queue-state.md when multi-path mode is in effect.
